name: ingested_at
description: When this row was written to BigQuery

name: forecast_hour
description: The hour this grid reading applies to

name: load_mw
description: Actual or forecast system load in megawatts

name: stress_pct
description: Grid stress as percentage: load_mw / capacity_mw * 100

name: renewable_pct
description: Percentage of supply from renewable sources

name: flex_alert_active
description: Whether a CAISO Flex Alert is currently in effect
